root.name: Bloody Caracal
血染狞獾
root.description: Missile-oriented fit with enough staying power to clear all
导弹方向配置，可全打完

branch.fit: [Caracal] [low] Ballistic Control System I Ballistic Control System I Ballistic Control System I Type-D Restrained Inertial Stabilizers [med] Small Azeotropic Restrained Shield Extender Small Azeotropic Restrained Shield Extender Missile Guidance Computer I , Missile Precision Script Enduring Multispectrum Shield Hardener 10MN Monopropellant Enduring Afterburner [high] Prototype 'Arbalest' Rapid Light Missile Launcher Prototype 'Arbalest' Rapid Light Missile Launcher Prototype 'Arbalest' Rapid Light Missile Launcher Prototype 'Arbalest' Rapid Light Missile Launcher Prototype 'Arbalest' Rapid Light Missile Launcher [rig] Medium Polycarbon Engine Housing I Medium EM Shield Reinforcer I Medium Core Defense Field Extender I [cargo] Type-D Restrained Inertial Stabilizers x3 Caldari Navy Nova Light Missile x1000 Legion Scourge Auto-Targeting Light Missile x2000
